name: Lone Star Brisket
recipeInstructions:
1. Place brisket in a Dutch oven and brown on all sides.
2. Add onions and garlic; sauté until well browned.
3. Add the remaining ingredients.
4. Cook, covered, until meat is tender (2 ½-3 hours).
Or,
1. Brown brisket, onions, and garlic as above in a large crockpot.
2. Transfer all into the crockpot along with the remaining ingredients.
3. Cook on low for 10-12 hours or overnight until meat is tender.
